title: clinopodium alpinum subsp. nebrodensis
intro: Clinopodium alpinum subsp. nebrodensis, also known as Clinopodium alpinum subsp. nebrodensis, is a subspecies of the alpine savory plant, a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which aid in treating various health issues. The plant is known for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Clinopodium alpinum subsp. nebrodensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
